title: poa supina f. alpigena
intro: Poa supina f. alpigena, a lesser-known subspecies of the Poa supina plant, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of North America and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Poa supina f. alpigena include its ability to soothe digestive issues, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Poa supina f. alpigena can be made by infusing the dried plant in hot water or as a tea, and it can also be used as a topical paste to apply directly to affected areas.
